title: Resilience Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger resilience foundations judgment so founder performance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Resilience Foundations is a leverage point inside founder performance. It supports the broader goal of decision-making, time allocation, energy management, and resilience.
coreConcepts: Resilience Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good resilience foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Resilience Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
